title: Bari, Apulia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bari, Apulia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bari is a city in Apulia with a population of 316,000. Apulia’s lively coastal capital, known for its whitewashed old town, fresh seafood, and as the gateway to the stunning Adriatic coast.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
